name: Chronic Condition Cashflow Risk
description: A chronic body issue can interrupt work capacity, attention, and unexpected spending.
life_effect: The wealth line needs health-adjusted pacing; otherwise intervention can turn into depletion.

financial_effect.reason: health risk can interrupt cashflow and force spending

name: Stable Sleep Protects Buffer
description: Sleep quality is good enough to protect basic execution and reduce burnout spending.
life_effect: Body stability slightly improves the chance that small income becomes retained buffer.

financial_effect.reason: stable sleep protects execution and financial consistency

name: Stress Lowers Financial Patience
description: Stress and fragmented attention make long-horizon financial planning harder.
life_effect: The person may seek fast relief or fast proof instead of compounding patiently.

financial_effect.reason: stress lowers patience for slow wealth accumulation
